entities.name: SOIL EROSION
entities.description: The process of wearing away of topsoil by physical forces such as water and wind

entities.description: The use of mathematical models to predict and analyze soil erosion processes

entities.description: Global Applications of Soil Erosion Modelling Tracker, an open-source database of soil-erosion modelling records

entities.name: UNITED NATIONS
entities.description: International organization supporting global soil-erosion assessment

entities.name: GLOBAL SOIL-EROSION ASSESSMENT
entities.description: A country-based assessment of soil erosion conducted by the United Nations

entities.name: STATISTICAL ANALYSIS
entities.description: The application of statistical techniques to analyze soil erosion modelling data
